name: Pasta Pomodoro (Tomato Pasta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and add onion and whole garlic cloves.
2. Saute until onion is golden.
3. Add tomatoes with liquid and simmer over low heat for 1 1/2 hours, or until sauce thickens.
4. Add bouillon cubes and season to taste with salt. Heat until cubes dissolve.
5. Add chiles and/or bacon (if using) and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
6. When ready to serve, remove garlic cloves and chiles.
7. Stir in olive oil.
8. Meanwhile, cook macaroni until tender but firm and drain.
9. Pour tomato sauce over macaroni and add cheese.
10. Toss with fork and spoon until sauce and cheese are well distributed.
